ai_backend_test_preparation.instruction: Improve and execute backend API test coverage only. Do not perform frontend or UI validation. Validate all outcomes through API responses and database verification.
ai_backend_test_preparation.scope: Include the following backend modules only: - Articles / Draft lifecycle - Version history / Restore / Deduplication - Notifications - View count / Stats - Comments - Reactions - Helpfulness
ai_backend_test_preparation.test_case_requirements: - Cover positive, negative, boundary, empty, security, and business-rule scenarios. - Cover create, read, update, and delete paths where applicable. - Cover ownership, authorization, validation, deduplication, and summary aggregation rules. - Keep test cases reproducible and independent.

case.description: Create a new draft article
case.preconditions: Authenticated author exists and target category exists.
case.expected_result: 201 Created, draft article returned, and one initial version snapshot persisted.

case.description: Create article with missing required fields
case.preconditions: Authenticated author exists.
case.expected_result: 400 Bad Request and no article persisted.

case.description: Create article with maximum allowed title length
case.preconditions: Authenticated author exists.
case.expected_result: 201 Created because the title is within the accepted limit.

case.description: Create article with invalid data types
case.preconditions: Authenticated author exists.
case.steps: POST /api/articles with numeric title and numeric content.
case.expected_result: 400 validation error and no article persisted.

case.description: Update draft article with changed content
case.preconditions: Owned draft article exists with one saved version.
case.steps: PATCH /api/articles/:articleId with changed title and content.
case.expected_result: 200 OK, article updated, and one additional version snapshot created.

case.description: Update article with identical content
case.preconditions: Owned draft article exists and latest saved version matches the current article content.
case.expected_result: 200 OK and no new version snapshot created.

case.description: Update article with empty content
case.preconditions: Owned draft article exists.
case.expected_result: 400 validation error, article content unchanged, and no extra version created.

case.description: Retrieve notifications with latest-20 limit
case.preconditions: Authenticated author exists with more than 20 notifications.
case.expected_result: 200 OK and only the latest 20 notifications returned.

case.description: Retrieve notifications when none exist
case.preconditions: Authenticated author exists with zero notifications.
case.expected_result: 200 OK and empty array returned.

case.description: Increment published article view count once per session
case.preconditions: Published article exists and two reads use the same viewer session key.
case.steps: GET /api/articles/:articleId twice with the same cookie header.
case.expected_result: Both requests succeed and view count increments only once.

case.description: Access auth-required endpoint without authentication
case.preconditions: Notifications endpoint requires bearer authentication.
case.expected_result: 401 Unauthorized.

case.description: Delete comment by non-owner
case.preconditions: Published article and owner comment exist; acting user is different from comment owner.
case.expected_result: 403 Forbidden and comment remains undeleted.

case.description: Create comment with empty content
case.preconditions: Published article exists and acting user is authenticated.
case.expected_result: 400 validation error and no comment persisted.

case.description: Add first reaction to published article
case.preconditions: Published article exists and acting user is authenticated.
case.steps: POST /api/reactions with articleId and type LIKE.
case.expected_result: 200 OK, reaction persisted, and summary shows LIKE count 1.

case.description: Update draft article by non-owner author
case.preconditions: Draft article belongs to author owner and acting author is not the owner.
case.steps: PATCH /api/articles/:articleId with another author's bearer token.
case.expected_result: 403 Forbidden and article remains unchanged.

case.description: Delete own draft article
case.preconditions: Owned draft article exists with saved versions.
case.expected_result: 200 OK, article deleted, and dependent versions removed.

case.description: List draft articles returns only current author's drafts
case.preconditions: Two authors each have at least one draft article.
case.expected_result: 200 OK and response contains only drafts authored by the requester.

case.description: Read another author's draft article detail
case.preconditions: Draft article exists and acting author does not own it.
case.expected_result: 403 Forbidden.

case.description: Get owned article versions
case.preconditions: Owned draft article exists with multiple saved versions.
case.expected_result: 200 OK and response contains all saved versions ordered newest first.

case.description: Restore previous article version
case.preconditions: Owned draft article exists, target version exists, and target content differs from current content.
case.expected_result: 200 OK and article content restored to the selected version without duplicate snapshot creation.

case.description: Restore article with missing version id
case.preconditions: Owned draft article exists but the provided versionId does not belong to the article.
case.expected_result: 404 Not Found and article content remains unchanged.

case.description: Mark own notification as read
case.preconditions: Authenticated user has an unread notification.
case.expected_result: 200 OK and notification isRead becomes true in database.

case.description: Mark another user's notification as read
case.preconditions: Unread notification exists for a different user.
case.expected_result: 404 Not Found and target notification remains unread.

case.description: Read article stats summary
case.preconditions: Published article exists with seeded views, comments, and helpfulness ratings.
case.expected_result: 200 OK and response counts match database aggregates, excluding deleted comments.

case.description: Create top-level comment and notify article author
case.preconditions: Published article exists and acting user is not the article author.
case.expected_result: 201 Created, comment persisted, and article author receives one notification.

case.description: Read article comments with one-level replies
case.preconditions: Published article exists with one top-level comment and one reply.
case.expected_result: 200 OK and response nests the reply under its parent top-level comment.

case.description: Reply to deleted parent comment
case.preconditions: Published article exists and parent comment is soft-deleted.
case.expected_result: 400 Bad Request and no reply comment persisted.

case.description: Toggle same reaction twice removes it
case.preconditions: Published article exists and acting user is authenticated.
case.steps: POST /api/reactions twice with the same articleId and type LIKE.
case.expected_result: Second request removes the user's reaction and counts return to zero.

case.description: Upsert helpfulness vote
case.preconditions: Published article exists and acting user is authenticated.
case.steps: POST /api/articles/:articleId/helpfulness twice, first with HELPFUL then with NOT_HELPFUL.
case.expected_result: Only one rating row remains and final summary reflects NOT_HELPFUL for the acting user.

case.description: Reject invalid helpfulness value
case.preconditions: Published article exists and acting user is authenticated.
case.expected_result: 400 Bad Request and no helpfulness rating row persisted.

case.description: Register a new author account
case.preconditions: Email is not already registered.
case.expected_result: 201 Created, user returned with AUTHOR role, and user record persisted.

case.description: Login with invalid password
case.preconditions: User account exists.
case.expected_result: 401 Unauthorized and no new data persisted.

case.description: Get current authenticated user profile
case.preconditions: Valid bearer token exists for an authenticated user.
case.expected_result: 200 OK and response contains the authenticated user's profile.

case.description: List published articles with pagination metadata
case.preconditions: At least 12 published articles exist.
case.expected_result: 200 OK, 10 items returned, hasMore=true, nextSkip=10, and items ordered by published date descending.

case.description: Reject invalid article list pagination limit
case.preconditions: No special setup beyond reachable API.
case.expected_result: 400 Bad Request because limit must be between 1 and 50.

case.description: Read article comments on the second page
case.preconditions: Published article exists with at least 25 top-level comments.
case.expected_result: 200 OK, 10 comments returned, hasMore=true, and nextSkip=20.

case.description: Reject invalid comment list pagination limit
case.preconditions: Published article exists.
case.expected_result: 400 Bad Request because limit must be between 1 and 50.

case.description: Create bookmark and list it for the current user
case.preconditions: Published article exists and user is authenticated.
case.steps: POST /api/bookmarks then GET /api/bookmarks with the same bearer token.
case.expected_result: Bookmark is created and appears in the authenticated user's bookmark list.

case.description: Delete existing bookmark
case.preconditions: User already has a bookmark for the target published article.
case.steps: DELETE /api/bookmarks/:articleId with authenticated user's bearer token.
case.expected_result: 200 OK, bookmarked=false returned, and bookmark row removed from database.

case.description: Reject bookmark creation for inaccessible draft article
case.preconditions: Draft article exists but is not published.
case.expected_result: 404 Not Found and no bookmark row persisted.

case.description: Retrieve hierarchical category tree
case.preconditions: Categories exist with parent-child relationships.
case.expected_result: 200 OK, nested category structure returned, and total matches database category count.

case.description: Filter published articles by tag with pagination
case.preconditions: At least two published articles are associated with the same tag.
case.expected_result: 200 OK, one tagged article returned, total reflects all matches, and tag metadata is included.

case.description: Reject invalid search pagination input
case.preconditions: Search endpoint is reachable.
case.expected_result: 400 Bad Request because skip must be a non-negative integer.

case.description: Search published articles by keyword with pagination
case.preconditions: Published and draft articles exist with overlapping searchable content.
case.expected_result: 200 OK, only published keyword matches are returned, and pagination reflects the full match count.

case.description: Retrieve version history of an owned article
case.preconditions: Authenticated author owns an article with multiple persisted versions.
case.steps: GET /api/articles/:articleId/versions with the owning author's bearer token.
case.expected_result: 200 OK and versions are returned in descending updatedAt order.

case.description: Create an initial helpfulness vote
case.preconditions: Published article exists and authenticated user has not voted yet.
case.expected_result: 200 OK, one helpfulness row is saved, and the returned summary reflects HELPFUL for the acting user.

case.description: Change an existing helpfulness vote
case.preconditions: Published article exists and the authenticated user already has one helpfulness vote.
case.steps: POST /api/articles/:articleId/helpfulness after an existing HELPFUL vote for the same user.
case.expected_result: 200 OK, the existing row is updated in place, and the returned summary reflects NOT_HELPFUL.

case.description: Switch reaction type for the same article
case.preconditions: Published article exists and the authenticated user already reacted with LIKE.
case.steps: POST /api/reactions with the same articleId and a new type LOVE.
case.expected_result: 200 OK, the existing reaction is updated from LIKE to LOVE and the summary counts change accordingly.

case.description: Create article with large JSON content payload
case.preconditions: Authenticated author exists and the category is valid.
case.steps: POST /api/articles with a large content array payload.
case.expected_result: 201 Created, article content is persisted without truncation, and one initial version snapshot is created.

case.description: Create comment with invalid articleId
case.preconditions: Authenticated user exists but target article does not exist.
case.expected_result: 404 Not Found and no comment row is persisted.

case.description: Create reaction and verify DB state
case.preconditions: User and article exist, and there is no prior reaction for the same articleId + userId pair.
case.steps: POST /api/reactions and verify API response, before/after DB state, and summary side effect.
case.expected_result: 1 record is inserted in the Reaction table, the articleId + userId combination exists exactly once, and the API summary reflects LIKE count 1.

case.description: Bookmark creation persists in DB
case.preconditions: User and published article exist, and the user has not bookmarked the article yet.
case.steps: POST /api/bookmarks, then GET /api/bookmarks, and verify before/after DB state.
case.expected_result: Bookmark record exists in DB with the correct userId and articleId, and the bookmark appears in the authenticated user's bookmark list.

case.description: Create comment and verify persistence
case.preconditions: Published article exists and the acting user is authenticated.
case.steps: POST /api/articles/:articleId/comments and verify API response, before/after DB state, and notification side effect.
case.expected_result: Comment is stored with the correct articleId and userId, and the article author receives one notification as a side effect.

case.description: Reject article list with non-numeric pagination params
case.preconditions: Published articles exist and the endpoint is reachable.
case.expected_result: 400 Bad Request because skip and limit must be valid integers.

case.description: Reject comment list with empty pagination params
case.preconditions: Published article exists and the comments endpoint is reachable.
case.expected_result: 400 Bad Request because empty skip and limit query parameters are invalid.

case.description: Search uses default pagination when params are omitted
case.preconditions: Published search matches exist and the search endpoint is reachable.
case.steps: GET /api/search/articles?q=playbook without skip and limit query params.
case.expected_result: 200 OK and default pagination values skip=0 and limit=10 are applied.

case.description: Article list returns empty page when skip exceeds total records
case.preconditions: Published articles exist but requested skip is larger than the result set.
case.expected_result: 200 OK with an empty items array and no next page metadata when skip exceeds the total record count.

ai_backend_test_preparation.test_data_requirements: - Users with AUTHOR and VIEWER roles - Categories for article creation - Draft and published articles - Article versions with distinct and duplicate snapshots - Notifications owned by different users - Comments with top-level, reply, and deleted states - Published article collections for pagination cases, empty-page behavior, and default-pagination checks - Reaction and helpfulness rows for aggregation checks - Bookmarks owned by authenticated users - Tags linked to published articles for search filtering - Before/after mutation probes for reaction, bookmark, and comment persistence checks
ai_backend_test_preparation.coverage_summary: - Articles: create, read, update, delete, ownership, validation - Versioning: list, restore, deduplication - Notifications: list, limit, mark read, authorization - Stats: view deduplication and aggregate counts - Comments: create, read, delete protection, deleted-parent rule, persistence verification, and notification side effects - Reactions: create, toggle-off rule, and DB persistence verification - Helpfulness: upsert and invalid-value validation - User/Auth: register, login failure, current-user profile - Bookmarks: create, delete, list behavior, and DB persistence verification - Category tree: nested structure and total count - Search: keyword filter, tag filter, pagination validation, and omitted-parameter default handling
ai_backend_test_preparation.constraints: - Backend only - No frontend or UI validation - API responses and database state must both be verified - All test cases must be executable and reproducible
